'''Tarnese Lyanne''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sakiyan/Legends|Sakiyan]] who was the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Tarnese Bleyd]]'s [[pride-father]] in the wild world of [[Sakiya]]. His investments in [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] operations led the betrayal of [[Shiltu]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], who ruined the [[Sakiyan/Legends|Sakiyan]] and the whole [[Clan Tarnese]].
